text: Dwayne Bohac says the Annies List political group supports third-trimester abortions on demand.
Scott Surovell says When did the decline of coal start? It started when natural gas took off that started to begin in (President George W.) Bushs administration.
Barack Obama says Hillary Clinton agrees with John McCain "by voting to give George Bush the benefit of the doubt on Iran."
Blog Posting says Health care reform legislation is likely to mandate free sex change surgeries.
Charlie Crist says The economic turnaround started at the end of my term.
Robin Vos says The Chicago Bears have had more starting quarterbacks in the last 10 years than the total number of tenured (UW) faculty fired during the last two decades.
Republican Party Texas says Jim Dunnam has not lived in the district he represents for years now.
Barack Obama says "I'm the only person on this stage who has worked actively just last year passing, along with Russ Feingold, some of the toughest ethics reform since Watergate."
context: a Democratic debate in Philadelphia, Pa.

text: Oregon Lottery says However, it took $19.5 million in Oregon Lottery funds for the Port of Newport to eventually land the new NOAA Marine Operations Center-Pacific.
Duey Stroebel says GOP primary opponents Glenn Grothman and Joe Leibham cast a compromise vote that cost $788 million in higher electricity costs.
